reviews.text:
My Experience with Sunlight Law PLLC.
I recently called seeking an employment attorney and explained that I’ve been under significant stress. During the call, I felt the representative was impatient when I went off-topic, and instead of continuing to discuss my legal needs, they asked about my mental health history, including whether I had seen a therapist or received counseling for depression. While such questions might be appropriate in some contexts, I felt they were unnecessary and not handled with sensitivity. I was hoping for understanding and reassurance but instead left the call feeling uncomfortable and disrespected. Based on my experience, I would not recommend contacting this firm.

You should probably update your listings and your websites. They do not do civil litigation you might want to call them and ask them but if anyone understands the time it takes to call and talk to lawyers it's kind of tedious to not be able to read in their bio what they actually do. Hopefully they actually defend and represent their clients better
They are straightforward and open and honest with what they can and can't do.
Attorney favian Valencia helped two of my siblings one with his divorce and the other one with a different issue. We recommend this attorney
Professional and bilingual staff!
Went in after a car accident, staff was incredibly knowledgeable, made my life a lot easier. Definitely would recommend.
Sunlight helped me with a wrongful termination suit.  They are a great group of people to work with.  The staff is friendly and professional.  Favian has his client's best interest in mind.

I hired Fabian for my immigration  case and he doesn't have any idea in regards consulate processing, the day of my appointment in Juarez back in may of 2018 the official told me that I needed another waiver(I-601) because I brought my daughter with me into USA and my lawyer could of applied for it while I was in the USA same as he did with my I-601A ,right after my interview I contacted Fabian's office to explain what happened and to see what was my next step and his responded  was sorry I won't be able to help you and just gave me a few lawyers name thank God I had the money to hired a different lawyer(Tamerton Granados) and pay for the waiver thank God after 10 months  I'm back home with my family in the USA so my recommendation is if your seeking consulate processing look for a different lawyer.
Professional and bilingual!
Favian was so kind and helpful, also very prompt with giving me some legal advice I needed. He is wonderful to work with

I had the pleasure of working with Favian Valencia while attending the prestigious Trial Lawyers College in Wyoming.  We spent a month together in a highly charged, highly emotional psychodrama training.  It is here that I saw Favian rise above the problems and find viable solutions.  When everyone else was ready for bed, Favian was offering free yoga classes which became extremely popular after just a few nights.  Favian is an attorney that I would trust my my own case.  He is compassionate, caring, honest, hardworking, and intelligent.  I truly look froward to working with him again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Looking forward to working with you as well. Thank you for the kind words!

10 star ! Patrick and Ryan helped me with my situation. This law firm is amazing, great communication, very friendly. Friendly secretary and attentive to my details! You’ll get a response in a timely manner and you don’t have to chase them down for a response!  Thank you Patrick! Ps the squatter is OUTTTTTT!

((More communication))
First off I would like to say they took care of my issue.  of getting a POS squatter /renter off my premises, The frustration I had with this company is i paid couple thousand dollars to them, I need a little bit More communication. I called several times with several times being told I would get a call back and never did.. Eventually my questions were answered but a lot of flustration in the meantime.. The last part of my ranting here is... After the case was over and closed , I was getting bills from third parties such as people who serve the squatter.. The sheriff that goes out there..ect.. Not one time, did anyone ever say to me that money That I was giving them for my case. Did not go for any of this ...meanwhile, I got people knocking down my door wanting money and is just frustrating thinking few months later. That things are said and done And i'm still paying for it on top of the money I already paid them. My personal opinion is consolidate all the money into a payment. And you guys pay these other people directly and not your customer. You want repeat business in the future this is not how to get it..$80 here $100 there $80 over here... After it's been over with for months , not cool please try to correct this for future people leaving bad and negative reviews... Tell them the money they are paying you directly does not cover any of the serving fees or Sheriff fees. So they're not under the impression If nothing is changed at least.
Again thank you for getting that nasty person out of my house l o l
Very hard to get ahold of have email bunch of time asking for updates I never got one email, phone call  , nothing 😕 back one star I would avoid this lawyer
Great very professional

I have email Patrick in many instances regarding one of his clients he is very unprofessional wont reply to emails or calls and front desk always says they will pass the message on and yet nothing this issue was over a year ago and still on going. And lack of information unless I have an attorney they won't talk to me
Very thankful to Pat, Herlinda, and the rest of the team at True Law Group!

Thank you Jodi and Claudia. My husbands permanent residency got approved in under a year. They are professional and communicate clearly. Their support and legal knowledge helped simplify the complex process, leading to a successful outcome. Being responsive and thorough they helped us be well prepared through out the entire process.
Great to work with and helped with everything needed.Definitely would recommend !

Working with Jodi and her team has been one of the best decisions I made during my journey to applying for permanent residency. From the very beginning, she was incredibly detail-oriented, ensuring that every step of my case was handled with care and precision. What stood out to me the most was her integrity and genuine dedication—I always felt I could trust her 100%.

She was not only communicative and resourceful, but also very informative, taking the time to explain things clearly and make sure I understood each part of the process. It never felt like I was just another case; she truly cared about my outcome and was invested in my success.

Jodi became a big part of my journey, and I am deeply grateful for the support, professionalism, and compassion she showed throughout. I highly recommend her to anyone in need of an immigration lawyer who is both knowledgeable and truly committed to her clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your support. As a firm we truly care about each of our clients!

reviews.text:
Jodi and Claudia are absolutely the best. They helped my husband apply for Legal Permanent Status, then they helped him become a US Citizen.
They also helped my mom become a Legal Permanent Resident in less than a year! My mom had seen 5 different attorneys and was told they couldn’t help her. When we went to Jodi and Claudia, my mom was not expecting much but when she was told she could become a LPR, we could not believe it. A few months later, my mom now has her green card.

I only recommend Jodi and Claudia to my friends and family.
Worked with Jodi and Claudia and let me tell you they are the best at what they do. Great team that i definitely recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Yakima Law's legal expertise and management of delicate matters with poise and efficiency sets them apart. I am forever grateful for their guidance during trying times and recommend them to the highest level. Thank you Brooke Barnes and Stephanie Santana for all your support!

Thanks to Yakima Law for being apart of my citizenship process. Jodi was amazing every step, always available and never made me feel bad for asking questions. I will recommend them to every one looking for great representation during an immigration case.

Brooke,

I must say, you are a wonderful and lovely individual. You are a rare jewel, not only in the world of the legal system and of attorney's, however, as a real friend also. Stephanie, and all your office staff reflect, and radiate all these same, wonderful qualities also.

Please, always know how valued and a comfort to others, you and your staff truly are to others. You helped give me peace. The quiet in the storm. And so, please continue to hold these precious qualities within you, near and dear to your hearts.

I am so thankful I was led to you and your law firm. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Thank you for understanding me, believing in me, and validating me.

God bless,

Rhonda H.
Thankfully, thanks to attorneys Jody and Claudia from Yakima Law, we were able to achieve a successful outcome in our immigration process. 100% recommended!!!

These firm embarrassed my mother and ruined her  case. Her attorney's inability to do his duties resulted in her having to withdraw her case. This law firm is not something I would suggest. They are only trying to take your money and are quite reckless. The Washington State Bar Association should be notified about them.
I called on Tuesday to make an appointment to go over a Real Estate contract and spoke to someone directly. I was never followed up with to set up an appointment.

Was supposed to have a phone consultation with Matt.  He missed the call.  No call happened.  Despite Matt calling me to apologize in a voicemail and saying there is no charge (obviously) and me calling and emailing their office many times over the years about this (many different office staff; must be high turnover?)  they still send me an invoice for a service that never happened....constantly.  And each time I am assured it is handled and won't happen anymore.
From the reviews below it looks like the representation there is great so I cannot comment on that.  This review is strictly toward their office staff and billing.  If they cannot even rectify something as simple as this I would definitely not trust them with handling any serious or sensitive personal information.
The BEST

My experience with Yakima Law and particularly with Jodi Mumford was beyond exceptional. She made sure I understood the the process we would be going through, how long it could possibly take, and what I needed to do whenever I received a request of verification letter. Jodi was on top of my case 100% of the time and never had to wait long periods of time to get an answer to my concerns or questions. She made us feel as if she was with us every step of the way and couldn't be happier for have choosen her as our attorney for our immigration needs. She will continue to be our attorney of choice for immigration and will be recommending her services to anyone that needs an attorney for immigration purposes. Thank you Jodi you are truly amazing we value your dedication to us during this process and all your hard work.
Jodi Mumford  best immigration lawyes

Brooke Barnes and her paralegals are an amazing team. I definitely recommend anyone at Yakima Law! She is very honest, confident, straightforward, relatable, encouraging and all around a magnificent attorney!

The Paralegal team at Yakima Law is a forced to be reckoned with. No other team can compare to the team at Yakima Law.

Jodi was extremely helpful as we navigated through the immigration process for my husband.  She helped ensure that everything was documented appropriately and prepared for our interview.  In addition she was available during the final steps of our process, as my husband entered customs.  Her and her team were very communicative and supported us during this extremely stressful time.

They are truly the best!! Brooke is one of the best attorneys one can imagine to have - who makes you feel heard, understood and cared for!! Nieves the paralegal is one among the most genuine honest person I have met!! Both together and one can have the best team in their corner.

David and his attorney Martina were amazing and made a very difficult time in my life feel a lot smoother ! David explained in detail all of my questions and concerns and did exactly what they were supposed to! I 1000% recommend David ! You will not regret it !

They are excellent lawyers, very good indeed. 100% recommended. We are very grateful to Yakima Law and to God because they won our case and gave us the opportunity to live peacefully again. Just when I thought I was out of luck I was appointed this amazing team and working together got me out of a sticky situation I have no words to express my gratitude for everything y’all did in the entire process of my trial. Thank you all so very much David and Martina 🙏🏽

After 2 yrs of struggling with different law firms who basically took my money I came across and hired both Mathew Kaminski and Nina Rodriguez. I can't Thank them enough for restoring my life. Mrs, Barnes is someone you can trust to represent you to her fullest potential, she genuinely cares for her clients and doesn’t intimidate easily, she’s firm and confident in her profession. All cases are different however I recommend you get a consultation and see if she can be a blessing like she was in my case. Thank you  Brook Barnes and Stephanie Santana for bringing my daughter back!!!

Brooke and Nieves have been wonderful in helping me through this legal process. I am lost in it all, and they explain things to me clearly, and they have so much patience. It really shows that they go out of their way to try and do what they can for their clients! So far, things are looking great for me and my daughter, and I would recommend them to anyone!
Update:
I am so pleased with all their efforts! Nieves and Brooke both showed me how much they care for me and my daughter. After everything, Brooke did such a good job!! We were able to get everything I asked for! 100% She is so sweet and caring! If anyone feels like they are lost, do not understand the legal process, or feeling like you do not know where to start, I would definitely give them a call!! My daughter and I were lost and I did not know what to do. I called a lawyer who then recommended me to Brooke and we are so happy to have had her through this whole process!

I absolutely recommend Yakima Law. I don't know what I would have done without Brook Barnes. Court can be really intimidating but it's nice to know you have an someone who knows what they are doing on your side.

COVID-19 was a barrier, but she was able to connect with the Colombian consulate to approve the cases, and the boys were able to get their visas and travel to the United States with no problem.
WE RECOMMEND JODI!!!  We are very happy!!!
She is one of the best immigration attorneys in the Yakima valley.

We trusted Shawn Murphy to guide and protect us through a deeply personal and complex custody matter. What we received instead was silence, passivity, and a complete lack of advocacy when it mattered most.

We raised concerns early. We asked for strategy. We asked for a Guardian ad Litem to ensure fairness in advance. We were told “no, you don’t want to do that.” When the opposing party launched a campaign of shame-based filings, distortions, and unfounded allegations, and strategically got a GAL assigned, there was no defense mounted—no preparation, no coaching, no warning. Just: “Well… did you do it?”

Worse still, Mr. Murphy stood by while I was removed from my home—twice—and ultimately jailed over a deceptive technicality buried in a temporary protection order. No one was in harm’s way. It was a manipulative tactic, set up by the other party and the GAL, and our attorney said nothing.

No objection. No guidance. No support.

We weren’t just clients—we were a family in crisis. And I, as a longtime stepmother who had raised this child for years, was told not to contact the office. Despite being central to the case, I was silenced and sidelined.

This wasn’t representation. It was abandonment.

Because of this failure to act, we were left exposed to legal abuse and coercive tactics that have left lasting emotional harm—especially to a child who deserved better from the system and the people hired to protect him.

If you're looking for an advocate, keep looking. You deserve someone who will actually show up.

I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude and appreciation for the outstanding work you have done in representing me. Your hard work and diligence have kept me free and close to my family, which means more to me than words can express.

Throughout the legal process, you kept me informed and up-to-date on every aspect of my case. You were always available to answer my questions, address my concerns, and provide me with the reassurance and confidence I needed to face the challenges ahead.

Most importantly, you fought tirelessly to defend my rights and secure the best possible outcome for my case. Your hard work, dedication, and legal expertise have ensured that I can continue to live my life as a free person, with my family by my side.

I cannot thank you enough for the incredible work you have done on my behalf. I would highly recommend your law firm to anyone in need of legal representation, knowing that they will receive the same level of care, dedication, and professionalism that I have experienced firsthand.

Once again, thank you for everything you have done for me and my family.

Sincerely,

Stokes Lawrence failed my family when we needed them most. My father hired them with a very clear and urgent goal: to protect my legal rights in the event he became incapacitated. Despite knowing this, they drafted documents that ultimately did not protect me — and never warned us that such a devastating failure was even possible.

When I sought answers and help after the fact, I was met with delayed responses, hollow apologies, and empty referrals to other attorneys who “might” help — with no real effort to correct the damage they caused. Their handling of this situation showed a complete lack of care, accountability, and professionalism.

Hiring an attorney is an act of trust. Stokes Lawrence broke that trust completely. They were negligent when drafting critical documents, negligent in advising us, and negligent in standing behind their work when problems emerged. Now, I must live with the fact that my father’s last wishes will not be honored.

If you value your family’s well-being, your legal rights, and your peace of mind, stay far away from Stokes Lawrence.

reviews.text:
I was in a car accident in 2020, and I was so grateful to have Tamaki Law on my side.  The auto insurance company was very difficult to deal with, but Tamaki Law stayed diligent on my behalf.

My attorney Megan, was incredibly strategic and responsive. She always kept me informed of the progress of my case and she was always available to answer my questions. She was also excellent at explaining the legal process to me in a way that I could understand.

Tamaki Law was able to negotiate a favorable settlement for me, and I am so grateful for their help. I highly recommend Tamaki Law to anyone who has been in a car accident.

Here are some specific examples of how strategic and responsive Tamaki Law was in battling the auto insurance company:

-Tamaki Law was able to obtain all of the relevant evidence from the accident scene, including police reports, and medical records.

-Tamaki Law was able to identify and retain experts to testify on my behalf, including a medical expert.

-Tamaki Law was able to file all of the necessary paperwork and pleadings on time and in accordance with the law.

-Tamaki Law was able to aggressively negotiate with the auto insurance company on my behalf.

I am grateful for Tamaki Law's help in my case. They were truly my advocates, and they always fought for my best interests.

Tamaki law also does the great and difficult work of representing victims of institutional abuse.

I highly recommend Tamaki Law to anyone who has been in a car accident and have already referred other accident victims to them.
reviews.ownerResponse: It means a lot to know that our work made a difference, and we’re honored by your trust and recommendation.

reviews.text: Working with Tamaki Law has been the most positive legal experience I have ever had. Bryan Smith represented me, and every staff member I met treated me with genuine kindness, patience, and empathy. My case stemmed from a painful, traumatic event, yet the firm guided me toward real closure and healing. I am deeply grateful to have found Tamaki Law and to have had Bryan supporting me at every step.
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re grateful you trusted us and glad your experience brought a sense of support and resolution.

reviews.text: I came out of an auto wreck with a broken bone that required surgery, traumatic concussion, and chest trauma. Having always been able to handle decisions and be proactive, I was very surprised at my inability to focus and the brain-fog from these injuries while healing. Concentration was difficult and post-accident events that had to be handled arrived almost immediately. You are not just dealing with your auto insurance, but also with health insurance and, in my case, Medicare (very complicated), car-impoundment, bids on loss, doctor appointments, etc. all while suffering pain and trying to heal. The one decision I did make quickly was to realize I needed some help. I was lucky to have attorney Bryan Smith and paralegal Janet to assist so no mistakes or bad decisions happened. Communication was clear and quick. I simply informed them of anything that came up and they took it over.  Not only did Tamaki Law handle these things expertly and with kindness, but they always took into account my desires and interests during the settlement. I could not have done this on my own or realized the amount of settlement I received.  Thank you to Tamaki Law—highly recommend.
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re grateful you reached out during such a difficult time and are glad we could help ease the burden while keeping your interests at the center.

We strive to do the best job we can for clients. Sometimes, clients are not happy about such things as a prosecutor's offer or the position that a client find themselves. Offers are often based upon factors that a prosecutor's office deems important, such as history, facts of the case, etc. That is ultimately the one thing that an attorney cannot control. The beauty, however, of the criminal justice system is that an individual can force a prosecutor to prove any charges in a jury trial.

reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Adam in my family case. Nice guy that is professional and gets the job done! Would definitely recommend!

I worked with Don Schirm and his staff on my recent family court case, and I could not be more grateful for the experience. From the very beginning, I was incredibly impressed with Don’s genuine humanity throughout the entire process. He made me feel like he truly cared about me as a person—not just as a client.

Don was professional, compassionate, and diligent. He fought hard on my behalf and represented me exceptionally well in court. He paid close attention to the details I shared with him, came fully prepared, and communicated clearly and confidently. His dedication to understanding my situation made all the difference.

Don and his staff were consistently responsive, timely, and supportive whenever I had concerns or questions. Their guidance helped me tremendously during a very stressful time.

I truly appreciated working with Don and his team and would highly recommend them to anyone needing strong, caring, and professional legal representation.

I drove 16 hours one way to see my 4 year old little girl just to be wrongfully denied visit. I was then hit with two unwarranted restraining orders by my ex wife. I contacted multiple law firms looking for someone to hear me out. Adam was quick to respond and was willing to listen. Adam represented me and was able to get both restraining orders dismissed and I no longer have any issues visiting my little girl. Thank you so Very much Adam!!!

Don Schirm is incredibly professional and helpful. He explains things clearly and responded quickly whenever I had questions. I would highly recommend going to Don Schirm at Resolute Law PLLC in Kennewick, WA.

I would not recommend Resolute Law based on my experience over nearly five years with them. The attorney handling my case, Adam, often failed to return calls or respond to questions, and rarely took time to discuss my concerns in detail. Our scheduled appointments were typically rushed, lasting only a few minutes, with little useful advice provided.

While attempting to modify child support, I provided nearly two years of pay stubs and insurance documentation, yet the firm still questioned the accuracy of my information. They even contacted a separate employer (a company my business subcontracted for) rather than accepting official HR documents I provided to verify my employment details. Even after I clarified this with proper documentation, my concerns were ignored.

Despite repeated attempts to get answers to direct questions, the firm rarely responded—yet I was still billed for emails and texts that went unanswered. To make matters worse, when the firm withdrew as counsel, they charged me for the work involved in preparing their own withdrawal.

After they withdrew, they even called to remind me of an appointment still on their calendar and charged me for that, despite no longer representing me.

Overall, my experience with Resolute Law was disappointing and costly. Communication was poor, accountability was lacking, and I was left feeling unsupported after years of working with them.

I strongly advise anyone considering Resolute Law Firm in Yakima to be specific with your wants and needs of your case.
I hired Adam to represent me in a protective order case, and his handling of my case was alright.
After I followed his advice to complete an anger management evaluation and provided documentation promptly,  I repeatedly asked when we’d go to court or what the next steps were, I was being charged for every email and phone call—despite zero progress
my case sat for months, showing no urgency, even when the protected party initiated a modification. That would have been the perfect moment to push for dismissal. Over the course of a year, I endured over 10 false allegations and a pending violation. Adam did defend me—but by then, it was too late.

Resolute Law Firm’s billing is questionable, I found duplicate charges on my account, which were refunded without question
After I closed my case and retrieved my remaining retainer, Adam was mor then willing to offer his advice and direction in other matters.

I can’t say enough good things about Don Schirm and his team at Resolute law. Everyone is very knowledgeable, helpful, polite and patient when explaining situations you don’t understand fully. Total Rockstars in the Courtroom 10 stars 🤩😎 they accomplished a settlement on my case that gave me almost everything I needed/wanted. I would not hesitate to retain him again!!!
He did a wonderful job handling my sons divorce. He went the extra miles it took with guardianship for his special need children. I will beforever thankful.

As busy as lawyers are, Don L. Schirm Jr. dropped everything and helped me with my case the same day I needed him. He cared about my needs and was there for me during stressful time and even calmed me down. I will always come back to him for all of my needs.

Update 9/22/24 - after 4 months since my initial call, they still haven't called me back.

Update 8/22/24 - after 3 months since my initial call, they still haven't called me back.

Update 7/22/24 - after 2 months since my initial call, they still haven't called me back.

Update 6/22/24 - after a month since my initial call, they still haven't called me back.

I didn’t receive a call back during the week so I followed up at the end of the week on which she said they will call me back the following week. Still, no call back.

During hard times, we seek help. Communication is paramount to ensure help can or can’t be received.

Let me start off with how professional and understanding he was during the entire process.  Numerous occasions of high stress were matched by a well rounded individual that talked me through the motions and needs of the case.  Don never made me feel like "just a client" and his entire staff/office did the same. When it comes to attorneys you typically do not expect empathy and understanding at a level that the staff exudes.  Resolute Law is more than just an attorney's office.  They are a group of highly trained professionals with family at the heart. No other Attorney will I ever use. If you are looking for the right Family Law Attorney to hear you and work diligently for you, choose Don.

Adam was extremely supportive and caring and went the extra mile to make sure this case was heard in her favor, as her wellbeing depended on it.  Adam is levelheaded, and calm in the face of danger and chaos, a great attribute to have as an attorney.  Adam knows the law, and how to use it for his client's best interests.  I would recommend him 100%.

After 8 years of having DACA, I was shocked when my renewal was unexpectedly denied. Nothing in my situation had changed—I had the same circumstances, same background, everything was exactly the same. When I submitted my renewal, the process took longer than expected, and eventually, I received a letter indicating that my case was likely to be denied. I was confused and frustrated, especially since my previous renewals had gone smoothly.
I initially worked with a different attorney who submitted the paperwork, but after receiving the denial, I knew I needed a second opinion. That’s when I contacted BARAJAS LAW PLLC, Norma took the time to thoroughly review my case and quickly acted upon the situation. The same charge from nearly 17 years ago something that had never been a problem in past renewals—was now causing complications, I had no other issues on my record.
Norma immediately took action. She worked fast, was professional, and truly cared about resolving my case. She helped me file a motion to remove the charge from my record. Thankfully, it was dismissed, and my record was cleared. After that, we refiled the DACA renewal application—and I was approved again!
I’m incredibly grateful for Norma’s help. She is professional, trustworthy, and knows exactly what she’s doing. If you’re dealing with a DACA issue or any immigration case, I highly recommend her.

Norma and her team guided me along the way with professionalism, clear communication, and genuine care. She is up to date with current processes and legal nuances, and her expertise made a complex process smooth and stress-free. Highly recommend.

It has been a few years since I have emotionally recovered from a very intense bad divorce. I attended every hearing even if I didn’t have to go but I showed up anyways. I wanted to be present to see what my money got me but mostly to stand for myself. I have to say I made an awesome choice with C. Lighty. She was a pit Bull in court and she fought for me. I made sure she had all information and in order and she had my ex’s attorney shaking in her shoes and turned her into a bundle of explosives nerves. Good job! They tried to lie and my attorney put in sealed doc.the proof.
She did not play around and I made sure I was very direct with her and what I expected out of her and she delivered. She basically saved my life. I don’t speak for anyone else’s experience but God was looking out for me and he used C. Lighty well. I WILL use her again if I need any attorney again.
She is a win win for me
Catherine is never prepared for court! I gave her all the evidence to speak for me and I was muted. She can’t do anything and just said “ok” and didn’t defend me
I had great experience with my separation after calling lightly law and working with maggie. I was happy with the way i was treated/represented and the way my case was handled.

Craig Lighty and his firm took very good care of me after I was hit on my motorcycle at an intersection. Rosa stayed on top of my case and worked directly with my medical providers requesting them to hold off on billing until settlement. I had zero stress during this process and simply focused on my recovery. The office checked up on me regularly and kept me updated on the status of the case.  I couldn’t have asked for a better team to help me through this rough time! If you are in need of an injury attorney, there’s no need to go anywhere else..
I HIGHLY recommend Lighty Law for divorce/family legal needs. Catherine and her entire staff are very caring, knowledgeable and informative. So thankful for their assistance in my process!
I would give her a zero if I could! Stay far away from this firm!!

If I could give this attorney zero stars I would. Does not exercise what she tells you during your consultation. Does not communicate, is constantly out of town, does not meet with her clients in person, when talking to her it's almost as if she's not present, she was unprepared for court, does not communicate accurate information to judges i.e. told the judge I was not on the house title and my ex was, my name is on the house title and I had told her this many times before our hearings. Long story short this seperation has financially ruined me, with my income alone I was not able to keep up with bills, day to day expenses, and attorney fees, Lighty refused to wait for me to come up with the 2K to deposit as my trust fund and dropped me a week and two days before our hearing. I would highly recommend you do not use her, one year of attorney fees all while my children's father has gotten away with not being financially responsible for his portion of caring for our children. Horrible experience.
Extremely knowledgeable and helpful!

I have used Cathy a few times over the years and she is always, professional, honest and hardworking. She listened to me and took the time to make sure I understood what was happening with my case. Her team is organized, friendly and professional. I would highly recommend using Cathy for any family court issues that arise. In addition to being a great Attorney, she is kind and respectful.

When I called attorney Lighty and talked with her about possibly divorcing after 35 years of marriage, she was extremely informative with every option I could choose. I was very impressed with her friendly, yet dignifying response. Her Assistant is sharp and quick to handle all the paper details and many phone calls! I would highly recommend Attorney Lighty. She truly is The Best of The Best! You won’t be disappointed.
Unprofessional.
Great team, felt like they were as dedicated to the case as I was and ended with the judge ruling in our favor. I would definately use them again if needed.
Spent more time telling me why they couldnt help me than listening to what my problem was.

Experience – Advocate - Compassionate – Supportive – Fighters - Hope

My  Story: During my search for a divorce attorney, it became apparent that my situation was going to be difficult. Conversations with one attorney left me without hope.

I then sought the advice from four friends, with varied legal experience, all who recommended Cathy, stating that she’s an excellent attorney with much  experience who would fight for me. During my first visit with Cathy, she too indicated the circumstances were indeed difficult, but at the same time, I could almost see in her mind  that she was trying to figure out a way to make it work.  She mentioned a couple strategies and it was then, I felt hope. I knew that Cathy was to be my advocate; she would fight for me.

During information gathering and subsequent communications with opposing counsel, I primarily worked with Cathy’s paralegal, Amber, who was incredibly encouraging, helpful, wise and supportive.
Yes, there were tough times, nonetheless, I stuck to the trust I had in these two women with over 60 years of legal experience between them.

Wisely, Cathy suggested mediation because of my situation. She was well prepared for mediation and articulately explained the options to me throughout the process. Finally, we looked at each other and smiled. We knew we had accomplished the goals we had sought. Time for a high five!

My experience with Lighty Law Office was not a good one. I had several meetings with one of the members who was helping to handle my case and on more than one occasion I was confused with another client who had the same name as mine which concerned me that they were unorganized. My main concern was important information I had offered going unheard until I brought it up multiple times. After adding it to my case they failed to send it to the judge until after it was due. The judge wouldn't use the information for that reason.
The parking can be tricky and they are on the spendy side. However the staff have been very compassionate and understanding so far.
Nice leagal help

Divorce is obviously one of the most stressful things a person could face, but so glad I hired Cathy and her firm.  Worked with her and Amber (her paralegal) and both were exceptionally competent and placed me at ease as I consistently felt my case was in good hands.  Cathy is a strong advocate and knows her stuff, and that definitely came across in the courtroom.  At bottom, Cathy and the firm are just the types of representatives a person facing the collapse of their marriage should want, that is, advocates who will convincingly present your case and character in such a manner which preserves your dignity throughout the legal process.

I hired Catherine lighty, and she did wonders at first then with out telling me she pass me off to Lauren that Practice in the same office with out asking me or having my sign an new contract for having a new lawyer. I feel Catherine was more in it for money. She had let my ex's lawyer talk her into putting in the order that because of my DV I couldn't have my son and also cuz of my pending charge but the judge only said pending charge and his lawyer came over asked her if it was ok and she told him yes. As a lawyer she should told  Christopher no to that in the order. The next thing I have emails back and forth asking to put in child support in the order from Lauren and she never put it in so I went with out it for a year now. When I wanted to take him back for it they wanted me to pay down my  Balance after I just paid her over 1,000. I feel they just want money and keep making me go back to court to fight for my son. Also she new a had a pending charge I was waiting and fighting for in court my ex had on me and lighty went to court even with the pending charge at that time I lost cuz of the pending charge waiting to be drop. I believe she should never let me go back to court tell it was done and over with. I lost having my son for full custody because of it. Make sure you speck up and don't let them do what you don't want and double look over paper work. I wish i would done things different and had a lawyer who would truly fight for me.

Unfortunately I hired Danial Lorello who 'dumped' me half way through my divorce. That did not bode well. My X  hired Ms Lighty and she was represented very well indeed. Very professional and very good representation. Wish I could have a 'redo' with Ms. Lighty in MY corner, but oh well...I heard Mr. Lorello 'retired'...tisk tisk...
Would recommended to anyone. From the Legal Assistants to the Lawyer, amazing and very personable. Glad I went their route.

Beware, I’m in financial ruin because of this company, they took me for everything they could ran up the bill in a short few months. Paid a massive retainer thinking I was set for a while.. when I say massive I mean twice what I’ve ever been asked for. And it only lasted a few months with no work being done. Then instead of telling me I ran out of my retainer they just sent me a 7000 dollar bill saying they went over and I owed them another 7k. I’m really disappointed in this company I had a good feeling in the beginning but it was wrong. Please stay away
Don’t recommend Stay away from them, lawyer here made me loose my case 1 week ago, they only care about money, never seen anyone so incompetent as here.

Do not waste your money . This so-called attorney Smith took my money and completely failed to defend me. Once I paid, zero accountability. I felt completely abandoned during my case. It’s clear they only care about collecting payments, not actually helping clients. Save yourself the stress and find someone who will actually do their job. I wish I had seen a review like this before trusting them.

I had free 15 minute consultation with Shane Smith today and he reassured me on the questions and concerns that I had. You can tell hes very passionate about his job and actually wants to help people out. I totally recommend this company.

They said it would cost me $150 to ASK HOW MUCH it costs for their services.

Wouldn't give me the vaguest idea.

Total scam.

Family legal matters are never easy, but their professionalism, expertise, and steady communication made a difficult journey much more manageable. The positive reviews I read before choosing them were absolutely accurate. Highly recommended for anyone navigating complex family law issues.

I made the right choice to hire attorney Jarrod Hays. He won all of my cases against the State even when they appealed. Mr. Hays fought for me like no other and always felt like he had my back at all times.  His staff are also very responsive, knowledgeable, and welcoming. Definitely a 5 star rating law firm.
The team at skyview law was always there to answer any question, large or small. Provided a calm, friendly and honest feed back though a very very difficult time in my life. Thank you all alot!!

Sky view law is absolutely amazing! They go above and beyond, making sure to check in regularly with you,always quick to respond to any calls or emails. It was only one lawyer I saw there, so the other lawyers maybe be good, but the lawyer whose name is last was awful.
Great guy
Good law attorney!

reviews.text: Knows his job.
I am trying to get in contact with Scott does anybody have his current number? the one listed is disconnected.
He told me last court the best way to get ahold of him is they email yet I haven't got any response at all what's the point of even having an attorney.

I have to say... absolutely the worst communication, and business ethics I have ever seen. He never answers the phone, e-mails, anything.. And you can't leave a message because the voice mail is always full. I believe that he is definitely in the wrong line of work. I have filed a complaint with the Bar, and next stop is Department of Assigned Council. Would not even rate it one "star", but it was required to post this review.

It might o've been just fine. . . .  If the man would answer his phone or at least check his messages once in awile for Christ's sake. What's the use of even having a phone and a phone number unless you use em. My suggestion to him, for him is. . . . .  hire a secretary and check in with her regularly. You might just me pleasantly surprised.
The best

I worked with Athan after his name was given to me by a large law firm that recommended him without hesitation and described him as brilliant. They were right. Athan has extensive experience in every type of situation mentioned below, along with deep knowledge of contract and employment law, and he is a highly skilled negotiator.

What separates Athan from others is his combination of intelligence, strategic ability, and genuine commitment to his clients. I really felt that he truly cared about me, and I believe he obtained the best possible outcome. He can absorb large volumes of information, organize it, remember it, and use it effectively — he rarely needed to be reminded of the details of my case. He is exceptionally responsive, consistently available, and was proactive in contacting me with guidance, warnings, and strategy regardless of the day or hour. He is an outstanding communicator and trial attorney.

In today’s healthcare environment, many physicians who raise concerns or advocate strongly for patients may face institutional challenges that are difficult to navigate. For clinicians confronting hearings, credentialing challenges, medical board inquiries, or potential NPDB reports, informed legal support and advocacy is essential. Based on my experience and the experiences of others, Athan is THE go-to attorney for physicians in these situations. Without an attorney experienced in these matters, entire careers including decades of exemplary work can be damaged.

Your biggest challenge may be getting on Athan’s roster; he is in high demand for a reason. He has represented a vast number of physicians who trust him with their reputations and careers.

Marc LeGras, MD

Employment lawyer Athan was such an effective and savvy legal advocate in my case as a late career Pediatric Infectious Diseases physician facing serious challenges after 16 years of committed service at a Children's Hospital. Athan achieved resolution regarding the peer review complaints in addition to securing an updated employment contract while protecting my rights. He was able to do this very intelligently to minimize additional harm through unnecessary confrontation. In addition, Athan is very people-oriented, has a gift with the spoken & written word, and he is truly a joy to work with. His attorney fees became a worthy investment in the security of my chosen demanding career. He quickly earned my trust. I am very grateful he was recommended to me by another reputable law firm once I explained my case needs. Thank you Athan Papailiou for your legal expertise! You gave me an effective voice in my workplace when I needed it the most. Forever grateful, Dr. Sayonara Mató.

Attorney Papailiou is the finest attorney I've worked with in my professional career. This is a notable comment from an individual who has spent 18 years practicing medicine and an equivalent time as a high-level academic administrator. Both of these roles demand strong, supportive, legal expertise. Attorney Papailiou handled a key employment case for me with a strong combination of integrity, communication, kindness, and strategy. The outcome was extremely positive because of Mr. Papailiou's expertise in preparation, negotiation, and follow-through. I highly recommend Attorney Papailiou in any case that relates to employment law.

Athan Papailiou counsel was outstanding in every aspect. He listened and probed until he fully understood the issues at hand. He provided a thorough and balanced analysis. The options provided were filled with insight and the willingness and patience to make certain that I understood each option.
Without hesitation, I would recommend Athan Papailiou.

Athan is an outstanding lawyer with exceptional skills at negotiating for your case. I found him to be extremely proactive and assertive in working on your case and smart. I looked for 4 months to find a lawyer that was smart and could handle the case assertively and champion our cause. Once working with Athan I found myself not worrying anymore because I trusted that he had it for us. Compassionate , extremely smart , assertive, exceptional at what he does. Cant say enough.

Excellent attorney!

Thank you, Athan!

We came to Athan on short notice with a tight deadline looming in front of us, just before a holiday. Athan did not flinch, and jumped right in to help us. He burned the midnight oil after listening to our story and concerns. By lunch the next day, he had broken down our options into something that made so much more sense, and thoughtfully described the paths we had available to us. He made what felt like an impossible decision much easier to manage. I can safely say that Athan saved Christmas and we are so grateful to his hard work, and his ability to really listen to us.

Athan was fantastic to work with. His guidance regarding a time sensitive and complex dispute was was extremely helpful. Athan's attention to detail, strategic thinking, and clear communication made all the difference. I'm incredibly grateful for his hard work and expertise.  Thank you, Athan!

Everyone knows the financial impacts associated with legal issues, but the mental impacts are not often discussed. I don’t need to tout Athan‘s ability or pedigree, both should be obvious. Athan provided stability, guidance, and peace of mind knowing that he had the situation under control, which helped me sleep better during a very difficult time. His personal touch and sincerity made the best of a very difficult situation, and I am forever grateful.

My experience with Athanasios has been very helpful and I found that he is very professional and thorough with his research and perseverance during the investigation and honesty of true principles and integrity. He has been there not only as an attorney but as a personal and close friend. I would highly recommend this attorney for future references. Signed James R Butler

Athan and his office was very thorough, and communication was above and beyond. I have no previous experience with anything regarding legal matters and Athan made sure to explain everything in a manner that made sense to me. I always felt he was on my team and did everything to assist my case. I highly recommend him to any provider/professional that requires counsel.

Athan was absolutely amazing to work with, he listened to our concerns and addressed them in a rapid manner. Athan is fair and reasonable when it comes to his fees. I would highly recommend Athan to anybody that has employment issues.

Athan has the expertise and experience to help you save your career, maintain your sanity and win. If you are a physician bullied by hospital leadership and threatened with "disciplinary action", call Athan to know your rights and fight back. If you have been mislabeled as “disruptive”, call Athan before you even think about responding to the MEC otherwise it will be too late. Athan is the go-to lawyer for physicians facing complex credentialing and privileges disputes.

Excellent law guidance and services. Highly recommended for assisting with career and discrimination cases. Athan was friendly, professional, and knowledgeable. We were able to reach a positive conclusion for my case within a reasonably short amount of time.
Athan was so thorough and pleasant to work with.  He was responsive to helping me find a solution to a very complex and time sensitive issue.  I would highly recommend him to anyone.

I was placed in a very difficult position with very little time to respond. I was amazed at how quickly Athan was able to assess the situation and help me put a plan into place immediately upon contact to his office. He is a very caring, ethical, and organized attorney. Athan was able to relieve a great deal of anxiety and restore my confidence and thoughts needed to proceed in dealing with this situation. Lastly , he negotiated very favorably on my behalf. I will be forever grateful for his excellent work and caring attitude.

One of my friends referred me to The Law Offices of Athan P. Papailiou and really, he never disappointed me. My case was a little bit complicated with my business dispute.  He was so organized and professional, and I was especially impressed with his settlement strategy.  Never promised what he could not get for me. He smoothly dealt with potential solutions and whatever related to the case in an amazing way. What I got out of that is more than what I expect. Thanks, Athan for what you did for me, and thanks for all your wonderful team. I strongly recommend him for your case, and you won’t regret taking him on as your representation. Thanks!

Athan is an excellent lawyer. He has been very responsive, thorough, and is getting the results my partner and I are looking for. A definite recommendation for anyone looking for a brilliant and efficient attorney.

I was involved in a five year long legal dispute with an extremely well financed defendant. The case involved multiple rounds of meditation, a 3 week trial, a District 1 appeal, and an appeal to the Washington State Supreme Court. Mr Papailiou was a constant guide and advisor to me during this complex and challenging case. He was always available and responded quickly to all of my inquiries. His knowledge of the appeal process was invaluable. He is strategic, very knowledgeable, and a tremendous value. I would highly recommend him to anyone. His brilliance and dedication are unmatched.

Mr Athan Papailiou is a terrific attorney!  He has incredible energy and integrity.  I have personally had him as my attorney and with his persistent efforts he turned things around for me.  He is caring and seeks the best outcome for his clients.  He is still my attorney and have sent numerous clients to him.  All of them have expressed to me that they are grateful that I suggested him.  He is A+.

from the time I got my license before I was in a car accident.  And of course, once it happened, it was massive.  My car was totaled and I sustained injuries that sidelined me for months.  Knowing that I wouldn't be able to handle everything on my own, I got in contact with the Bernard Law Group.  Best decision I could have made.  The insurance company was offering one thing, but my lawyer made sure that I got much more than initially discussed.  Medical bills, income reimbursement, and even a little extra for my trouble.  I couldn't have done it without the people at Bernard Law Group.
They are very busy, but always make time to answer questions and did an outstanding job representing me.

I have worked with a few family attorneys and my experience with most is that they have heard the same story a million times and resort to simply going through the motions. Ms Murray and her team are worlds apart. Ms Murray listened to my story and truly believed in my case. Her team provided fast responses and gave me so much peace of mind along the way. Ms Murray is outstanding in the courtroom. Her graceful presence is calm, confident, and straight to the facts. It’s a breath of fresh air comparative to other attorneys who resort to loud talking and insulting the other party. Her rates are fair and her ability to make your case feel valuable is impactful. She will truly fight for you.

I want to thank my lawyer Kelly Murray from Justice Law . She was amazing in my case , always looked out for me and was constantly helping me and making sure my needs where met during my case. I definitely recommend her she is totally worth it ! I would not have asked for a better lawyer. Also a big thank you to her team and specifically thank you to Jaqueline and Lupe . Amazing people !

I had a wonderful experience with Kelly concerning a situation with my Dog.  I needed help, and when no one would listen to me, she did.  She listened to my concerns, and respected my goals.  She was kind and compassionate, but also direct and honest. We are very grateful for Kelly Murray of Justice Law Yakima!

I was recommended Justice Law, I was told that they are the best of the best. My interactions with them were anything but amazing, they were very poor. To be completely honest. I had an in person consultation at 2 pm. I showed up at 1:50 pm, I sat in the room until 2:30 when the paralegal finally came in saying "sorry, traffic was bad." I let it go. Had my consultation. I was told "our lawyer is out of town, on vacation. She will be back on Friday, I will call you by mid week, next week. We are a month and a half later and I have never heard back from them. Honestly, a waste of time and money. I would have rather had a consultation with someone who stuck to their word. I do not recommend this branch to anyone. They will take you $100 for the consultation which will be a waste of time, plus they will leave you waiting, then never call you back.
Take your money and time elsewhere.

After starting my brother's custody and divorce case with another attorney who retired midway through proceedings, He made the difficult decision to switch — and hired Kelly Murray with Justice Law Yakima, it was the best choice he could have made. From day one, Kelly, along with her team, jumped into a complicated, already-in-progress case and immediately brought clarity, strategy, and a sense of direction.

Kelly and her paralegal, Sumer, took the time to truly understand our concerns, especially around the safety and well-being of my nieces, and made it clear that they would do everything possible to protect us. Thanks to their expertise and dedication, my brother was ultimately awarded sole custody — something that felt nearly out of reach before they stepped in.

Justice Law Yakima were always responsive, honest, and professional. Even in emotionally tough moments, Kelly stayed calm, focused, and determined. I honestly don’t know where I’d be without them. If you’re looking for a family law attorney who will truly fight for you and your child, this is the one.

Kelly and her team were an absolute dream to work with. From the very beginning, she made me feel seen and heard, guiding me through the final steps of a long and difficult divorce journey. I can’t recommend Justice Law highly enough. Even during mediation, a moment filled with anxiety, Kelly was right by my side, helping me feel safe and supported. If you’re looking for a team that will stand with you through every step of your divorce, I wholeheartedly recommend Justice Law.

I can't say enough good things about Kelly and her team. From the very first consultation, I felt heard, supported, and understood. Going through a divorce was not easy, but Kelly and Lupe handled everything with professionalism, compassion and a deep knowledge of the law.

They were not only incredibly competent but also took the time to explain each step of the process in a way that made me feel confident and empowered. They were responsive, thorough, and always had my best interest in mind.

Thanks to their dedication, what could have been a very stressful experience ended with a fair and favorable outcome. I highly recommend Justice Law Yakima to anyone looking for guidance and advocacy in family law matters.

Seriously, I could go on and on about how amazing this office is but here’s a few things about my case that has stood out the most so far.

When I came to Justice Law of Yakima I was already 1.5 years into an extremely complex custody case. Kelly Murrary sat down with me and listened to what I had to say and it was very evident from day one that she possessed a deep level of empathy, compassion and care. Kelly is far from passive and has been the most zealous advocate for my children‘s safety, wellbeing and continues to fight tirelessly to ensure they are safe.  As a parent, handing over the level of trust required in this type of situation is nearly impossible but I had to trust little by little and it affirmed I made the right choice. I didn’t want an attorney to work for me, I needed someone to work with me and Kelly has done exactly that which is an incredible change of pace.
My paralegal Sumer that I have had for nearly 2 years now is an amazing asset to the team and has worked around the clock to ensure everything was being kept up on and nothing slipped through the cracks! Her recollection of events shows she cares and takes this personally. She is amazing and I so grateful to have her as part of the legal team helping me every step of the way.

To anyone reading this, I completely and fully recommend from my heart that if you are in a rough spot, cannot get good legal representation or have an extremely complex case that requires extra attention, you have found that place!!! These people are not strangers they are like family, they aren’t greedy, petty and blowing smoke, they really do care and I assure you, you and your family are in the best of hands!!

Thank you Kelly, Sumer, Lupe, Courtney and everyone else you will never know how grateful I am for you.

Paid $100 for a consultation fee. The paralegal told me they would contact me after consulting with the attorney… I called for weeks since no one ever contacted me. Why waste my time and money just to turn around and say you’re too busy?

I can’t not explain how much I love this law firm both Lupe and Kelly were amazing with a custody case for my nephews. They were always available for any questions. Kelly Was amazing! She was a force to be reckoned with in court! She succeeded getting the ruling we needed. Kelly and Her team held our hands through a very Complex process. Thank you Justice Law!

Lupe is very knowledgeable and professional. Highly recommend.
Lupe is the best! She’s very professional and super helpful. I definitely recommend hiring this firm.
Most professional and caring staff! The attorney is so ethical and amazing at her craft. Lupe handled my case so well. I couldn’t have asked for a better firm!

If I would rate them 10 stars If I could! They are so patient and amazing and have literally held my hand through my case I truly feel like I have an amazing team to help me in this difficult time! Very impressed with Ms. Murray. She is the ultimate professional that wins. Would recommend her to anyone that wants to be well represented.

Thank you Devon and Anita for your help. You did a great job on my case.  You can have confidence in them helping you on your case.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Sierra, for taking the time to write a 5-star review of Abeyta Nelson and attorney Devon Nikfard! reviews.text:
I was heading home on a summer evening, going through an intersection with a green light, when another driver ran a red light and hit me. My car was damaged, and I was injured. Car accidents happen so quickly, but I clearly remember the moment the police officer told me the at-fault driver did not have car insurance and that my own insurance would have to handle everything.

I immediately called my insurance company, and their only priority was getting my car fixed. They showed no concern for my injuries and couldn’t even provide me with a claim number after I reported the accident. That evening, I sought medical attention, and the very next day I called Abeyta Nelson Injury Law.

That same day, I spoke with Celia Reyna, the legal assistant, who promptly scheduled an appointment with the attorney. During my meeting, the attorney carefully reviewed my case and explained everything clearly. I quickly knew I was in good hands. Celia and attorney Devon Nikfard got to work right away.

Although car accident claims can take a long time, Celia and Devon made sure I received the medical care I needed while they handled all the paperwork and legal matters. I’m very detail-oriented, so I had many questions throughout the process. Celia and Devon always took the time to respond thoroughly and made sure I understood every step. Their communication and attention to detail gave me complete confidence in them.

When my insurance company was ready to settle quickly, Devon fought hard to ensure I was properly compensated for my damages and suffering. He kept me informed, never gave up on my case, and consistently checked in to make sure I felt like a priority.

Thank you, Abeyta Nelson Injury Law, for taking care of me when I needed it most.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear UPena,
Thank you for taking the time to write down the details of what must have been a very scary accident, followed soon after by a frustrating experience with your insurance company. We are so glad you didn't waste any time in contacting Abeyta Nelson. Attorney Devon Nikfard and legal assistant Celia are caring, experienced and hard-working. We are pleased to hear their communication along the way gave you confidence in your case. Our clients are our first priority, and it's important to us that you felt that way! Thank you for trusting Abeyta Nelson with your case.

reviews.text: Terry, Tara and Devon were the absolute best to work with. Totally organized, proficient, customer oriented and trustworthy. My best interests were always their top priority. I never thought I would be in  need of an attorney, but very thankful I went to these folks.

That's really important to us, and it's why we do what we do! We were grateful you chose to hire the Abeyta Nelson legal team and wish you all the best.

reviews.text: I am in quite possibly the most compromising position in my life, financially and physically but I can take a breath of relief after trusting my case to Abeyta Nelson Law. Devon Nikfard took on my personal injury claim and went the extra mile for me. I’m truly grateful and thankful for all the work that he and his team did for me. It has been a pleasure getting to know you guys, and thanks.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind review, Kenneth!  Our legal team strives to lessen the burden felt by our clients, and the fact that we could relieve some of that after your accident is so gratifying.  It has been our pleasure to get you know you as well!  Thank you for trusting Abeyta Nelson to handle your case.

reviews.text: This is an excellent law firm! After getting into an auto accident and feeling overwhelmed dealing with medical care and insurance matters, we decided to seek help from David Abeyta. David and Celia Reyna encouraged us to work on healing from our injuries while they took care of the rest. The medical and insurance issues were overwhelming, and I can't imagine trying to navigate them alone. Thank you both for everything you did to help us!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your strong endorsement of Abeyta Nelson, Paul!  Getting in a car accident can be one of the most stressful experiences of a person's life.  We are so glad you chose to seek help from Abeyta Nelson and let us navigate the insurance issues for you.  That's what we're here for, and we are so glad we could walk you through it all.
Thank you for your 5-star review of Abeyta Nelson, George!

reviews.text: Lovely attention, lovely results  Thank ypu!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Marcia, for taking the time to leave Abeyta Nelson a 5-star review!  We appreciate that and are grateful for the opportunity to work with you.
Thank you for leaving a 5-star review of Abeyta Nelson!

reviews.text: Best choice I made was choosing to have Mr. Abeyta represent me.  The BEST there is!  Period!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your strong endorsement of Abeyta Nelson, Loren!  It was such a pleasure to have the opportunity to work with you.

reviews.text: By far one of the very best law firms I have ever known or worked with. The level of professionalism was only matched by the level of care they showed me in my family in our time of need. They not only did what they could to get the very best outcome financially they also did the very best at showing us that we were more than just a dollar sign. Thank you Terry and Julie for showing us so much care and so much love through the whole legal process. Moments that we thought nothing would go right you guys showed us that it could and it did.

reviews.text: They treated me well.  And helped me through the process of the accident.

reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for this positive review! Our goal is to make the legal process easier and less stressful for each and every client - and we are so glad you felt supported and informed every step of the way. We are so grateful you chose Abeyta Nelson to handle your case!

reviews.text: Devon was amazing i was dealing with an insurance who wouldnt respond to my calls after 3 months of getting no where i called abeyta nelson and things started moving along Devon made sure my car got fixed and my case got settled better then i expected def would recommend him

reviews.text: 15 years later they send me a request to review them! Oh buddy! This will be short and sweet. Don’t use them! They will not put the work in to get you the settlement you deserve and when you try to negotiate their fees due to the tiny settlement they get you, they will oblige, but then turn around and charge you fees for office equipment used such as staples and paper clips. I ended up paying them the exact same amount. Hard pass in the future.

Excellent service!  I was in over my head with Dr visits and insurance claims and once I signed with Abeyta Nelson, they took over everything.  I didn’t have to deal with anything other than healing.  I felt well cared for.  Highly recommend 10/10
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Fred,
Thank you for your 5-star, 10 out of 10 review! We are so glad you hired Abeyta Nelson Injury Law to handle the stress of medical appointments and insurance claims, so you could focus on healing after your accident. Most importantly - we're gratified that you felt well-cared for by our legal team and that you were happy with the process and end result. We're grateful for the trust you placed in our law firm.

reviews.text: I wish I could use this firm for all of my legal needs.  They’re that good!

reviews.text: James Boyer has been such a great advocate as I negotiate the results of my accident.  He clearly cares deeply about achieving a positive outcome for me. reviews.text: When Terry Abeyta told me to just focus on healing and let his company do the rest, he meant it. reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for putting your trust in us. reviews.text: I heard about This law firm from a good friend and Recommended them to take my case then I read the reviews and felt like I made a good decision Rod and his assistant provided comfort all through the process. reviews.text: Terry took on my daughter's 'vehicle vs pedestrian' case and was able to collect the best possible settlement. Rod Nelson, was a life saver when I got injured at work. Him and his staff worked diligently for 4 years to get my case settled. Thank you so much.

reviews.text: Richard Gilliland is the best lawyer to work with, not only was he super understanding but I loved how he took the time to explain everything. I would 100% recommend! After speaking with multiple lawyers, I’m so glad we decided to work with him. Loved that I could reach him via email or call, and not once did I feel like I was a bother to him. In a time of such uncertainty I am so happy he was there to help me and guide me the best possible way. I can never thank him enough for his help. One of a kind!

I recently had the pleasure of working with Richard Gilliland. From the moment I contacted Hall and Gilliand, they listened attentively to my situation and provided clear guidance on how they could help me. This was my first time needing legal help, I wouldn't have been more confident without the help of Richard. He was instrumental in helping me lower my charges and navigate the complexities of the legal system.
Throughout the process, Richard was always available to answer my questions and address my concerns. Richard always led me to feel confident and prepared for my case. When I had a scheduling conflict due to work, he even accommodated an earlier spot in trial, which greatly reduced my stress and inconvenience. I was also impressed and grateful by their transparency about costs and their willingness to work with me on payment arrangements. This made the process much more manageable and allowed me to focus on what really mattered - resolving my case. Thank you to the office staff as well for the help with the financial process.
Thanks to Richard's expertise and dedication, my case was closed sooner than I expected, which was a huge relief. I would highly recommend them to anyone seeking a knowledgeable, compassionate, and effective lawyer. Richard is a great lawyer to have advocate on your behalf!!
I was very pleased with Tim Hall and his team. He was very informative, personal and got me the outcome i wanted.
Very professional very satisfied very much recommended

Highly recommend!
Richard is an excellent attorney. One thing I loved about working with him is that he always answered my calls, or returned them quickly. Top notch representation. Highly recommend!

I have always been impressed with this law firm (through word of mouth) though had never had the need to use their services. Attorney Tim Hall was extremely easy to work with and walked me through the possible outcomes. If the case was unable to be litigated in his initial analysis (i.e. I had no real case) I know he would not have dragged the case out for his own gain. I have nothing but great things to say about Mr. Hall and his staff as they fully researched my situation and helped me when I was unable to find an answer by trying to take care of it myself.

In other situations I have had to stay more on top of the case as a layman without an understanding of the law than made sense to me to make sure things were responded to on time and fully. Hall & Gilliland staff and Attorneys made sure to keep me informed every step of the way and let me know when decisions and filings were being made so that I was always 100% informed.

I couldn't be more pleased with the outcome and that is because this firm takes a proactive stance and truly is committed to helping make things right.
Great service gretchen was able to help me and my situation, answered my questions.i had lost my documents and she send me them again with no problem.

I highly recommend this law firm, prices are reasonable. They helped me with what I thought was impossible, Gretchen Hall has guided me through the whole process and answered all my questions and concerns.

reviews.text: We were referred to Montoya Hinckley Law office in Yakima to help us with our situation. My sister needed to come live with us, as she needed special care. Her ex was still living on her property which she owned from the early 90's. He would not leave and felt entitled to money and part of her property. It took awhile,  but she now has her property and can sell it for her care. Kevan and Tyler went way above and beyond for my sister, and we are extremely grateful for their work on my sister's behalf.  Thank you both for being willing to take on this chore. We wholeheartedly recommend the Law Office of Montoya and Hinckley!

We were involved in a traffic accident in  Yakima WA, 2200 miles from home. Our car was totaled, we were injured and we didn’t know where to turn for legal help. Luckily we called Kevan Montoya at Montoya Hinckley law firm. He visited us at our Airbnb the same day and was very friendly and professional, putting our minds at ease. I had to call the Seattle office to make sure. I explained what had happened and told them it was too much to lose. I told them it wasn't a scam, and the woman said, "I understand, but don't worry, you'll receive a receipt in your email. I'm sorry if you feel that way, but it has to be done."
